description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a cylindrical shape, slightly bulging at the center and narrowing at the top and bottom. The exterior is constructed from vertical wooden staves, held tightly together by two wide, black metal hoops—one near the top and one near the bottom. The wood surface is textured with visible grain and natural imperfections, giving it a rustic, weathered appearance. The top is flat and composed of closely fitted wooden planks, while one side features a small, round wooden bung, suggesting the barrel can be filled or emptied. There are no visible handles or decorative markings, and the overall look is utilitarian, suitable for storage or transport of liquids or dry goods in an urban or industrial setting.
description: A rustic wooden barrel with black metal hoops, flat top, and a small side bung, showing natural wood grain and a utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat wooden top, metal hoops, and a clear view of the wood grain.
description_view_1: Side view with the metal hoops and wood texture visible, no bung or additional features apparent.
description_view_2: Another side view similar to view 1, with the wood grain and metal hoops prominent.
description_view_3: Side view featuring the small round wooden bung near the bottom, along with the metal hoops and wood texture.
